name: Quick Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Velveeta cheese into small pieces and add it to a saucepan.
2. Add butter and milk to the saucepan.
3. Heat the mixture over low heat until the cheese has melted.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. In a separate bowl, dissolve cornstarch in half a cup of water.
6. Gradually stir the cornstarch mixture into the sauce, continuing to cook until you achieve the desired consistency.
